body_length.description: Maximum number of characters of the body to return starting at body_offset. Omit to return the whole body from the offset onwards. When the slice stops before the end, body_next_offset is the offset to request next.

body_offset.description: Zero-based character offset to start the returned body from. Use with body_length to page through a large body that a client would otherwise truncate. Compare the returned body length against body_total_length to detect truncation, then re-fetch from body_next_offset. Defaults to 0 (start of body).

version.description: Specific skill version to fetch. If omitted, the latest version is returned.
